title: Jack Sinfield (cricketer)
extract: Jack Sinfield (born 27 April 2003) is an Australian cricketer. He is a left-handed batsman and right-arm offbreak bowler. He made his list-A debut for Queensland Cricket on 14 February 2023 away against Victoria. He made his first-class cricket debut on 21 February 2023 against New South Wales cricket team. Sinfield was named in the Australia squad for the 2022 Under-19 World Cup.
